title: SubT MRS Hawkins多层数据集
author: yzp1767791249
body: 您好，很感谢您开源工作对社会的支持，我现在也是一个研究退化环境LIO系统的小白，想问一下您可以分享一下SubT MRS Hawkins多层数据集数据集吗，subt-mars官方的这个数据集链接打不开https://link.zhihu.com/?target=https%3A//superodometry.com/datasets，或者您方便告我一下如何打开这个数据集下载吗，十分感谢！

title: a question when read code.
author: J-J-Wang
body:
In the cloud_matching.cpp, there is:

`covMatrix = imu_to_lidar.block(0, 0, 3, 3) * covMatrix * lidar_to_imu.block(0, 0, 3, 3);`

but in my understand:
when we need change a Cov(X) = E  to Cov(RX), the Cov(RX)= R * E *R^T; 

the normal covMatrix is in the lidar coordinate,change to imu(as car body), why not is 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6fe1672a-cd14-494b-a310-7f9c9fb25383)

Tips:your code  config yaml is Identity Rotation matrix,it not  cause error.
Look forward to your soonest reply.

title: How to apply this nv_iom project to positioning during navigation process
author: kong3166
body: Hello, your code is very good. I am trying to apply this code to the SLAM navigation process. The method I am using is to pass on the topic of/nv_iom/deskew_cloud to other positioning algorithms. I am not sure if this is the correct way to use it? I am looking forward to your reply very much. Thank you

title: Could you please share the config file for SubT MRS Hawkins Multifloor dataset?
author: fire-heart-li
body:
I tried to modify the config file simply, but it failed on the SubT MRS Hawkins Multifloor dataset.
I am a begginer with SLAM. Could you please share the config file for SubT MRS Hawkins Multifloor dataset with me?
Thank you very much! Thanks for your excellent work!

title: Thans for your excellent work, a few questions about the dataset and evaluation
author: TongxingJin
body:
1. Do you have any plan to open-source the dataset in KAIST? Especially the 5 floors building shown in Figure 6;
2. How do you get the ground truth trajectory?

title: livox support?
author: lonlonago
body:
Hello Thank you for your work！

I want to ask whether Livox lidar is supported. If so, can you provide a config file of Livox？

In addition, I want to ask whether it is possible to set only the LIO function in the configuration file, because my data has no visual image data.

Thanks again!

title: Nice work, would you like put the preprint on the arxiv？
author: Gatsby23
